text:
One word to describe being a founder. Go. 👀👇

#Founder #Entrepreneur #Startup

Forget startups that mimic existing ideas. The world needs audacious innovation that tackles major challenges and creates a positive impact. 

Are you up for the challenge? 

#Startup #Pitch #Innovation

Founders are unstoppable. 🚀

Are you working to build a better world?

We want to hear from you! Applications to Techstars global fall programs close May 22nd.

Most car search platforms aren’t built to help you buy a car. They’re built to help someone else sell one.

That’s why Craig Smith built Visor. Visor (Techstars 2024) is rethinking car shopping with a buyer-first platform that surfaces real market data and transparent pricing and insights across listings.

Craig shares his journey from ERP systems to startups, the frustration that sparked Visor, and how building for the user, not the marketplace, can reshape an entire industry on the blog.

Amelia Miller and Lydia Miller, sisters and founders of ivee (Techstars 2024), made the Forbes 30 Under 30 Europe list! ⭐️

ivee, the upskilling and job platform, was originally created to help women re-enter the workforce. But after listening to users, the team recognized similar challenges across a broader audience and chose to pivot.

Today, ivee helps professionals focus on the AI skills that actually matter, with personalized training plans and skill profiles employers can trust.

The company now serves 100,000 users and 50 companies.

Inside Techstars AI Health Baltimore Accelerator. 🩺

Founders will gain access to real clinical environments, diverse operational models, payer and reimbursement insight, policy and regulatory expertise, scalable commercialization pathways, and real-world entrepreneurial mentorship and expertise

Apply using the link in our bio.

Let’s talk numbers. 📊

On average, founders raise $1M+ post-accelerator.

What could that look like for you?

Most pitch decks fail.
Most applications blend in.

Here’s how to avoid both.

Join us for Inside the Techstars Accelerator where we will show you how we run our accelerator programs, how to fix your pitch deck, application pitfalls to avoid, and top learnings from working with Techstars founders

See you there!

$166B lost to healthcare admin each year and 30% of cases still delayed or denied.

That’s why Athena Doshi built Exactrx. Exactrx (Techstars 2025) is transforming how healthcare organizations manage the revenue cycle and using agentic AI to automate claims preparation, reduce denials, and streamline complex workflows before they ever reach a human.

Our founders are locking in capital. 🔒

Swipe to see the top raises from Techstars portfolio companies in Q1 2026.

A look at the first month of our spring 2026 accelerators. ⭐️

Our founders are already building momentum, refining their companies, and making real progress across every program.

📍Baltimore, Chicago, Denver, London, Los Angeles, New York
